homepage.hero.tagline.message: संस्कृति की रक्षा करें। प्रतिस्पर्धी Web2 से सह-सर्जनात्मक Web3 तक।
homepage.hero.tagline.description: The tagline shown in the homepage hero — about protecting culture as we move from competitive Web2 to collaborative Web3.
